programme.title: News Bulletin
programme.desc: The hosts present some of the latest updates, current affairs and developments pertaining to economic, political and social issues.

programme.title: Dear David
programme.desc: Shortly after comic artist Adam responds to Internet trolls, he begins experiencing sleep paralysis while an empty rocking chair moves in the corner of his apartment. As he chronicles increasingly malevolent occurrences in a series of tweets, Adam begins to believe he is being haunted by the ghost of a dead child named David. Encouraged by his boss to continue the 'Dear David' thread, Adam starts to lose his grip on what is real.

programme.title: Hoon Payon
programme.desc: A young lad travels to a remote temple on an island to visit his brother, who has been living as a monk there. But he learns that his brother has gone missing after being framed for murder and theft. He decides to stay to investigate his brother's disappearance and to clear his name, only to discover more mysterious deaths in the adjacent village.

programme.title: Anything For Jackson
programme.desc: The sudden death of their only grandson, Jackson, prove to be too much grief for the overly religious elderly couple, Audrey and Dr Henry. Being Satanists, they uncover a spell that will allow them to resurrect Jackson in another vessel. They kidnap a pregnant woman with the intention of performing a 'reverse exorcism' by putting Jackson's essence into the woman's unborn child. Instead, the old couple accidentally open a portal to purgatory when various souls desire the vessel.

programme.title: Kulit
programme.desc: Satu demi satu pembunuhan misteri berlaku di sebuah perkampungan di Kelantan, di mana kulit mangsa akan di ambil dan dipercayai untuk dijadikan wayang kulit.

programme.title: Siapa Tutup Lampu
programme.desc: Five university friends, Akmal, Arif, Aryana, Azie and Amir go for a vacation in Genting Highlands. On the way home, they were involved in the accident which killed Amir instantly. While waiting for a doctor at the morgue to identify Amir's body, they are all locked inside. They experience strange disturbances. As they think it is Amir's restless spirit, they realize how much wrongdoings they have done to Amir despite his kindness. What would become of their friendship after this?

programme.title: Nightmare Side 2
programme.desc: Naya and Shelly both have a sixth sense and can see ghosts. However, Shelly keeps her condition secret, which makes Naya curious. At the same time, Naya starts listening to a supernatural programme on the local Bandung radio and her interest is piqued when she hears a discussion about supernatural events that are followed by horrific nightmares. However, she does not yet know the real reason behind her nightmares.

programme.title: Stalker
programme.desc: A young woman lives alone in a rented rooftop house. However, she cannot help shaking the feeling that she is not alone. After a bizarre experience, she slowly learns the truth about what happened in the house.

programme.title: Are You Scared
programme.desc: Six kidnapped teens awake to find themselves trapped in an abandoned factory, but they soon discover that their every move is being taped by a series of security cameras. A voice booms out, "Welcome to 'Are you Scared?'" They realize to their horror that they are on a reality show they applied to months ago, but this is nothing like they expected: no contracts, no producers and no way out... Jason, the cockiest of the bunch, is called out to play the first game, which ends with a literal bang. Kelly is the first to hear the echoing explosion and to realize that the show has turned deadly. She rounds up the others. Together they try desperately to find an escape route but an unseen figure is ever vigilant, biding his time until he's able to trap each of the teens one by one, forcing them to face their worst fears in games that they can't possibly survive as he exacts his horrific revenge.

programme.title: Teman Tidur
programme.desc: Amanda, a transfer student lives in a dormitory. She becomes close to Adam, and his gang. Their closeness triggers a cynical reaction from Davin, an excellent student. Still depressed over the death of his best friend, Kelly who committed suicide because of his viral erotic video, he suspects the Adam Gang spreads the video. Slowly, Kelly's spirit comes to haunt them through video chat terror, asking for justice for her death.

programme.title: Creepy Hide and Seek 2
programme.desc: When her student Ritsuko disappears, Ryoko is desperate to find her. When she discovers that Ritsuko was playing a strange online game of hide and seek, she begins to wonder if it could be related to her disappearance somehow. Ryoko then discovers that the game is more sinister than it appeared at first. It is linked to demonology and the supernatural. Will she be able to get past her fears and superstitions to discover what secrets the game of hide and seek might hold?

programme.title: The Missing
programme.desc: Iris, an architect, suffers from frequent hallucinations due to post-traumatic stress disorder after losing her younger sister to a kidnapping syndicate. Her ex-lover, Job, also an architect, invites her to go to Japan where he has been given the job of restoring a 100-year-old house belonging to Riku Watanabe. In Japan, they meet Aki and a fellow Filipino, Len, who is an intern. Soon, Iris is haunted by angry-looking yureis (Japanese ghosts) and learns about human sacrifices carried out at the house they are restoring.

programme.title: Siapa Tutup Lampu
programme.desc: Five university friends, Akmal, Arif, Aryana, Azie and Amir go for a vacation in Genting Highlands. On the way home, they were involved in the accident which killed Amir instantly. While waiting for a doctor at the morgue to identify Amir's body, they are all locked inside. They experience strange disturbances. As they think it is Amir's restless spirit, they realize how much wrongdoings they have done to Amir despite his kindness. What would become of their friendship after this?

programme.title: Tangisan Kubur
programme.desc: Salah seorang dari junior forensic mula didatangi oleh 'hantu' wanita mangsa bunuh. Dia dan rakan-rakan forensiknya mula membongkar rahsia wanita itu yang embawa mereka ke sebuah estet. Dan estet itu menyimpan satu rahsia yang mengerikan.

programme.title: Karya 12 - Alien Janda Baik
programme.desc: Kisah tentang sekumpulan makhluk asing yang terhempas di bumi dan cuba mencari jalan pulang. Pelbagai kejadian pelik terpaksa ditempuhi demi untuk pulang ke tempat asal.

programme.title: It Came From Below
programme.desc: While he was alive, Jessie's dad was passionate about tracking down a monster that was believed to dwell deep inside one of the local caves. He was often dismissed as a lunatic. Jessie's dad unexpectedly dies on one of his expeditions in the cave, leaving her in a depressive state. Her brother, Sam, and his friends Joanna and Marty try to get her out of her funk. The four of them decide to go spelunking in the cave with the ultimate aim of finding the monster and proving that Jessie and Sam's dad was right about the monster. In spite of warnings from the park rangers, they head into the cave where they find all the evidence they wanted. Problem is, will they ever get out alive to show it to anyone?

programme.title: Nightmare Side 2
programme.desc: Naya and Shelly both have a sixth sense and can see ghosts. However, Shelly keeps her condition secret, which makes Naya curious. At the same time, Naya starts listening to a supernatural programme on the local Bandung radio and her interest is piqued when she hears a discussion about supernatural events that are followed by horrific nightmares. However, she does not yet know the real reason behind her nightmares.

programme.title: Are You Scared
programme.desc: Six kidnapped teens awake to find themselves trapped in an abandoned factory, but they soon discover that their every move is being taped by a series of security cameras. A voice booms out, "Welcome to 'Are you Scared?'" They realize to their horror that they are on a reality show they applied to months ago, but this is nothing like they expected: no contracts, no producers and no way out... Jason, the cockiest of the bunch, is called out to play the first game, which ends with a literal bang. Kelly is the first to hear the echoing explosion and to realize that the show has turned deadly. She rounds up the others. Together they try desperately to find an escape route but an unseen figure is ever vigilant, biding his time until he's able to trap each of the teens one by one, forcing them to face their worst fears in games that they can't possibly survive as he exacts his horrific revenge.

programme.title: Without Name
programme.desc: While on assignment in the Irish woodland, land surveyor Eric sees shadows flitting between trees. He is fascinated yet disturbed. The shadows call out to him. If he answers, he will be their prisoner.

programme.title: Jackal
programme.desc: Jimmy Levine is a deprogrammer hired by Andrew Powell to rescue his son, Justin, from a murderous cult. The Powell family also consists of Andrew's wife Kathy, older son Campbell, Justin's girlfriend Samantha, as well as Justin and Samantha's baby, Zoey. They have gathered at Andrew's cabins in the woods to stage an intervention. Jimmy and Andrew stage a kidnapping and manage to get Justin back into the cabin. Strangely, in spite of various methods, Jimmy and the Powells simply cannot get through to Justin, who appears to have been thoroughly brainwashed. The cultists quickly track Justin down and surround the cabin. Beseiged, the occupants of the cabin are lured into traps one by one, and murdered in the most horrific ways imaginable. Finally, only Justin, Samantha and Zoey remain.

programme.title: Sis Ngesot
programme.desc: A band 'Sudu Garfu and The Napkins' is recording at 'Jinggles Studio' which is owned by a famous composer, Syafihi. While filming, the lights suddenly go out. Syafihi heads to the main switch box trying to fix the electricity, to no avail. Suddenly, the door to the studio is mysteriously locked and the band is visited by a strange ghost called 'Sis Ngesot' that appears from a corner of the room.

programme.title: Jenny
programme.desc: A young woman's answer to a horror Bloody Mary challenge turns awry as she instead unleashes an evil spirit from her past to return to her life.

programme.title: Crystal Inferno
programme.desc: At the 20th floor of a skyscraper, a gas leak has started a fire. Anne and Ben Bronson, two teenage kids, are trapped in a fiery inferno 20 storeys above the ground, while the fire is spreading throughout the entire building. From the 60th floor, their parents, Brianna and Tom, who were about to sign their divorce papers, will have to fight together to save their family from the flames. Even if Brianna is a brilliant structural engineer, will she find out a way to stop this uncontrolled fire?

programme.title: Mary
programme.desc: David buys a sailing boat that had been abandoned by the Coast Guard. He takes his wife Sarah, daughters Lindsey and Mary, Lindsey's boyfriend Tommy and David's friend Mike on a trip to Bermuda. The boat is christened Mary. While out at sea, tensions grow between the crew. Mary is acting strangely, while the already strained marriage between David and Sarah are further tested. Then, Tommy inexplicably attacks David. After committing him to an asylum, they hear that Tommy hanged himself. David and Sarah agree to turn around and abandon their disastrous trip, but more tragedy is in store for the journey home.

programme.title: Hantu Tok Mudim
programme.desc: Tok Mudim is the greatest ritual circumciser in his village whose reputation is tarnished when his assistant, Lebai Kulup, gets involved in a love triangle with Salmah, the prettiest girl in the village, and Borhan son of the Tok Penghulu. Due to his love for Salmah, Borhan meets Tok Mudim for a secret operation. Unbeknown to them, Lebai Kulup decides to sabotage the operation. Due to the failed operation, Tok Mudim is hunted by the villagers, and falls into a well to his death.

programme.title: Without Name
programme.desc: While on assignment in the Irish woodland, land surveyor Eric sees shadows flitting between trees. He is fascinated yet disturbed. The shadows call out to him. If he answers, he will be their prisoner.

programme.title: Pengantin Malam
programme.desc: A woman named Maya suffers from amnesia after a car accident. Ever since then, she is often haunted by a mysterious figure. Maya's husband, Razif, decides to take his wife to recuperate at his family villa.

programme.title: Fearsome
programme.desc: Seungyeon and his band are feeling uninspired, and decide to take a break in Chuncheon. While there, they put on a great show at a local club and are offered a seemingly great contract that comes with accommodation. After arriving at the dormitory, Jaehyuk gets an eerie feeling about the place. One by one, all the band members begin to hear creepy voices as though they are being watched. Almost as though ... they are not alone in the house...

programme.title: Fearsome
programme.desc: Seungyeon and his band are feeling uninspired, and decide to take a break in Chuncheon. While there, they put on a great show at a local club and are offered a seemingly great contract that comes with accommodation. After arriving at the dormitory, Jaehyuk gets an eerie feeling about the place. One by one, all the band members begin to hear creepy voices as though they are being watched. Almost as though ... they are not alone in the house...

programme.title: Are You Scared
programme.desc: Six kidnapped teens awake to find themselves trapped in an abandoned factory, but they soon discover that their every move is being taped by a series of security cameras. A voice booms out, "Welcome to 'Are you Scared?'" They realize to their horror that they are on a reality show they applied to months ago, but this is nothing like they expected: no contracts, no producers and no way out... Jason, the cockiest of the bunch, is called out to play the first game, which ends with a literal bang. Kelly is the first to hear the echoing explosion and to realize that the show has turned deadly. She rounds up the others. Together they try desperately to find an escape route but an unseen figure is ever vigilant, biding his time until he's able to trap each of the teens one by one, forcing them to face their worst fears in games that they can't possibly survive as he exacts his horrific revenge.

programme.title: Nightmare Side 2
programme.desc: Naya and Shelly both have a sixth sense and can see ghosts. However, Shelly keeps her condition secret, which makes Naya curious. At the same time, Naya starts listening to a supernatural programme on the local Bandung radio and her interest is piqued when she hears a discussion about supernatural events that are followed by horrific nightmares. However, she does not yet know the real reason behind her nightmares.

programme.title: Faceless
programme.desc: After a gruesome attack, George wakes up in a hospital room with total memory loss and is the recipient of a full-face transplant. George deals with the grueling pain of the major surgery and the psychological scars of having another man's face sewn onto his. Although he does not remember his self, he is plagued by flashbacks and now, not sure what is real and what is fake, will need to face his demons that brought him to this place. With his new, and ravaged scared face, George reenters the world attempting to unravel his past and unlock the horrific truth.

programme.title: Crystal Inferno
programme.desc: At the 20th floor of a skyscraper, a gas leak has started a fire. Anne and Ben Bronson, two teenage kids, are trapped in a fiery inferno 20 storeys above the ground, while the fire is spreading throughout the entire building. From the 60th floor, their parents, Brianna and Tom, who were about to sign their divorce papers, will have to fight together to save their family from the flames. Even if Brianna is a brilliant structural engineer, will she find out a way to stop this uncontrolled fire?

programme.title: Minyak Dagu untuk Ika
programme.desc: Zafran has a crush on Ika, his supervisor at the restaurant where they work. Nevertheless, he is all too aware of the gulf between them and he knows that he has no chance with her. Out of desperation, Zafran uses black magic in an effort to get Ika to like him. Pak Ali, a black magic practitioner recommends the use of "Minyak Dagu" which must be collected by Zafran himself from the grave of a woman that passed away while giving birth to her firstborn.

programme.title: Jenny
programme.desc: A young woman's answer to a horror Bloody Mary challenge turns awry as she instead unleashes an evil spirit from her past to return to her life.

programme.title: Lari Hantu Lari
programme.desc: Johnson, seekor hantu Cina dan rakannya, Samogam cuba menghiburkan hati Susan yang kematian suaminya namun mendapat halangan dari ketua hantu dan juga bapa Susan.

programme.title: Arwah Noni Belanda
programme.desc: Batavia, 1834. Hellen Van Stolch was the only daughter of Jacob, a Dutch-German landlord with a large plantation. She suffered a tragic fate of untold horror and her vengeful spirit roams the land until this very day. One day, she appears in the subconscious of Sarah Astari, a novelist who is working on a horror story. At first, Sarah is oblivious to this inter-dimensional intrusion and thinks it is nothing more than a nightmare. But everything changes when Hellen's spirit unleases terror after terror on Sarah and her family.

programme.title: Without Name
programme.desc: While on assignment in the Irish woodland, land surveyor Eric sees shadows flitting between trees. He is fascinated yet disturbed. The shadows call out to him. If he answers, he will be their prisoner.

programme.title: Crystal Inferno
programme.desc: At the 20th floor of a skyscraper, a gas leak has started a fire. Anne and Ben Bronson, two teenage kids, are trapped in a fiery inferno 20 storeys above the ground, while the fire is spreading throughout the entire building. From the 60th floor, their parents, Brianna and Tom, who were about to sign their divorce papers, will have to fight together to save their family from the flames. Even if Brianna is a brilliant structural engineer, will she find out a way to stop this uncontrolled fire?

programme.title: Nightmare Side 2
programme.desc: Naya and Shelly both have a sixth sense and can see ghosts. However, Shelly keeps her condition secret, which makes Naya curious. At the same time, Naya starts listening to a supernatural programme on the local Bandung radio and her interest is piqued when she hears a discussion about supernatural events that are followed by horrific nightmares. However, she does not yet know the real reason behind her nightmares.

programme.title: Creepy Hide and Seek
programme.desc: A blog on a mysterious website spreads like wildfire, starting a dangerous online game. When users are required to write their experiences online, the comments take a dark, demented turn, as if the players are being possessed as they play. Ryoko is a teacher and one of her students Ritsuko is one of these young people. Feel lonely after the divorce of her parents, Ritsuko becomes addicted to this dangerous game. One day, Ritusko invites her classmate Aikawa to join the game. However, Aikawa got scared and went home during the game. The next day, Aikawa finds that Ritsuko has disappeared...

programme.title: It Came From Below
programme.desc: While he was alive, Jessie's dad was passionate about tracking down a monster that was believed to dwell deep inside one of the local caves. He was often dismissed as a lunatic. Jessie's dad unexpectedly dies on one of his expeditions in the cave, leaving her in a depressive state. Her brother, Sam, and his friends Joanna and Marty try to get her out of her funk. The four of them decide to go spelunking in the cave with the ultimate aim of finding the monster and proving that Jessie and Sam's dad was right about the monster. In spite of warnings from the park rangers, they head into the cave where they find all the evidence they wanted. Problem is, will they ever get out alive to show it to anyone?

programme.title: Eyes
programme.desc: A mysterious-looking girl stares ominously at Yukari through her peephole: it is the start of a series of sinister events that occur one after another. Incomprehensible scribbles are left again and again on her porch, one of her best friends is killed in an accident, her father suddenly disappears leaving a puzzling message, and then her mother attempts suicide. While all of this is happening, the mysterious girl keeps appearing before Yukari. Is the mysterious girl responsible for all of these peculiar episodes? Yukari doesn't know for sure...

programme.title: Spiral
programme.desc: After an off-duty detective was murdered gruesomely, Detective Ezekiel 'Zeke' Banks and his rookie partner is tasked with investigating a series of grisly murders eerily reminiscent of the city's most infamous past homicides. Unwittingly entrapped in a deepening mystery, Zeke finds himself at the center of the Jigsaw copy cat killer's morbid game.

programme.title: Orphan First Kill
programme.desc: Prequel to the horror classic Orphan, this thrilling film begins with Leena Klammer orchestrating a brilliant escape from a psychiatric facility in Estonia. She then travels to America by impersonating the missing daughter of a wealthy family, Esther Albright. However, an unexpected twist arises that pits her against a mother who will do anything to protect her family at any cost.

programme.title: The Tom and Jerry Show
programme.desc: Tenacious cat Tom is forever on the tail of his elusive nemesis, Jerry the mouse. But as much as they hate each other, the two also share a warm bond.

programme.desc: When they are left home alone on a Sunday, Titoo and Golu decide to clean the house before their parents arrive. But soon Shera comes to their house and makes a mess of it to spite them.

programme.title: 99 Songs
programme.desc: A musician must compose 100 songs in order to reunite with his lover. However, his journey of heartbreak, redemption, loss and faith allows him to discover much more than love.

programme.title: Crazy Singh
programme.desc: Bittu, a village simpleton, falls in love with a modern Saumya. Chaos ensues when their contrasting families meet to fix their marriage.

programme.title: Paheli
programme.desc: A ghost falls in love with a newly-wed woman and disguises himself as her husband when her spouse goes away for business.

programme.title: Drona
programme.desc: Aditya is an orphaned and lonely young man. He soon learns that he belongs to a family of ancestral warriors who guard a mystic source of cosmic energy, and he must now take up his responsibilities.

programme.title: Yuva
programme.desc: The lives of Michael, Arjun and Lallan collide when they are caught in a web of criminal conspiracies during the changing political scenario in Kolkata.

programme.title: Love Aaj Kal
programme.desc: In a technology-driven world where love is on speed-dial, two lovers find themselves overcoming distances, failures and heartbreaks to find each other again and preserve the love they had abandoned.

programme.title: 777 Charlie
programme.desc: Dharma, a broken man drowning in despair, finds his world transformed when he rescues Charlie, an abused pup. Later, they embark on a journey of hope and redemption.

programme.title: Golmaal 3
programme.desc: Cupid strikes when Pritam, a single father, comes across his college sweetheart, Geeta, in Goa. However, when their respective children go at war with each other, the two find it difficult to reunite.

programme.title: The Family Star
programme.desc: A hardworking middle-class man, who takes his family responsibilities very seriously, meets a research student renting his penthouse named Indu, who changes his life.

programme.title: Boo
programme.desc: Four friends are captivated by a horror novel during Halloween. However, reality becomes hazy as they read it, and they must confront the apparitional threat that manifests.

programme.title: Lucknow Central
programme.desc: Kishen, an inmate in a Lucknow jail, yearns to be set free. When he learns that a few prisoners must form a band, he sees it as his ticket to freedom.

programme.title: Bol
programme.desc: The patriarch of a religious Muslim family refuses to accept his transgender son, which creates a conflict within the family and ends up tearing them apart.

programme.title: Kannum Kannum Kollaiyadithaal
programme.desc: Siddharth and Kalli never seem to be short on money. However, when they meet the women of their dreams, they are pushed into reconsidering their career choices.

programme.title: Dus
programme.desc: Jamwaal, a terrorist, plans to wreak havoc in Canada when the Indian Prime Minister visits the nation. A team of special agents from India are sent to catch the terrorist.

programme.title: F2: Fun and Frustration
programme.desc: Two young men dream of controlling their wives after marriage, but their chauvinistic mindset backfires, leading to a series of hilarious and troublesome situations.

programme.title: Dhruva
programme.desc: A committed police officer, Dhruva, uncovers a web of organised crime headed by a scientist, Siddharth Abhimanyu. But when Dhruva tries to build a case against him, he faces many challenges.

programme.title: Andhadhun
programme.desc: Akash, a piano player pretending to be visually-impaired, unwittingly becomes entangled in a number of problems as he witnesses the murder of a former film actor.

programme.title: Raththam
programme.desc: While investigating his friend's murder, Ranjith, a journalist, unearths the sinister network responsible for a series of crimes.

programme.title: Munjya
programme.desc: Bittu awakens Munjya, a fearsome spirit with an insatiable desire for marriage, who relentlessly hunts him down in a chilling pursuit.

programme.title: Sanga Thamizhan
programme.desc: Murugan, a happy-go-lucky young man, falls in love with the daughter of Sanjay, an industrialist. However, trouble arises when Sanjay notices that Murugan looks like a figure from his dark past.

programme.title: Rakshak
programme.desc: After his childhood sweetheart Anusha leaves him to be with her classmate, Kathir loses his mind and abducts her on her wedding day.

programme.title: Veera Sivaji
programme.desc: Sivaji, a taxi driver, strives to raise money for the surgery of his niece. However, chaos ensues, when he gets deceived and strives to overcome the challenges.

programme.title: Darling 2
programme.desc: Five friends on a holiday in Valparai find their getaway turning eerie when they sense the haunting presence of a friend who recently died by suicide.

programme.title: Superstar
programme.desc: Kunal belongs to a middle-class family and aspires to become a film star. He gets his dream opportunity when he is asked to stand in for Karan, a producer's son who looks exactly like him, in a film.

programme.title: Dashing Jigarwala 2
programme.desc: When the students of the Travancore Maharaja College start to form gangs and engage in crime and brutal fights, Edward Livingston, an English professor decides to restore order in the campus.

programme.title: Trial Period
programme.desc: A single mother seeks the help of an unemployed man when her son makes the unusual request to have a father for a 30-day trial period.

programme.title: Rider
programme.desc: As love blossoms between orphans Chinnu and Kitty, fate separates them as children. However, they grow up yearning to find each other.

programme.title: Dasara
programme.desc: In a town that is dependant on coal mining, the lives of three childhood friends turn chaotic when they get into a fight with the son of the village headman.

programme.title: Stree
programme.desc: In the eerie townscape of Chanderi, dressmaker Vicky falls for a mysterious woman with a supernatural aura. His heart sinks at the possibility that she might be Stree, the resentful man-hunter.

programme.title: Vikram
programme.desc: A special agent investigates a murder committed by a masked group of serial killers. However, a tangled maze of clues soon leads him to the drug kingpin of Chennai.

programme.title: Pati Patni Aur Panga
programme.desc: Popular celebrity couples brace themselves to adventure and excitement as they undertake unusual challenges that put their relationship and bond to the test.

programme.title: Pati Patni Aur Panga
programme.desc: Popular celebrity couples brace themselves to adventure and excitement as they undertake unusual challenges that put their relationship and bond to the test.

programme.title: Pati Patni Aur Panga
programme.desc: The couples encounter wild, new experiences rom changing diapers to getting tattoos, with each moment creating an enduring impression.

programme.title: Pati Patni Aur Panga
programme.desc: Popular celebrity couples brace themselves to adventure and excitement as they undertake unusual challenges that put their relationship and bond to the test.

programme.desc: Noyontara's ability to communicate with spirits enables her to bridge the gap between realms and uncover veiled truths. Her marriage into the Sengupta family sets in motion a series of revelations.

programme.title: Manpasand Ki Shaadi
programme.desc: Things get intense when Aarohi spots Abhishek at the club and slaps him. Later, a vengeful Abhishek decides to teach a lesson to Aarohi.

programme.title: Laughter Chefs Unlimited Entertainment
programme.desc: Celebrity duos tackle culinary challenges set by a renowned chef while engaging in communal activities to captivate viewers with their cooking skills and teamwork.

programme.title: Sasural Simar Ka
programme.desc: Sisters Simar and Roli share a very close bond with each other. They eventually marry two brothers, Prem and Sid, and live in the Bharadwaj household facing all their problems together.

programme.title: Thapki Pyar Ki
programme.desc: Thapki, a lively and intelligent girl, faces certain problems that affect her life. However, she decides to move to a city in order to find a job and meet all her challenges with a positive attitude.

programme.desc: The filmmaker explores the rich architecture and constitution of India's history, highlighting its unique design and engineering.

programme.title: Tales of Valour
programme.desc: Indian soldiers narrate their stories of bravery from the wars that they fought for India. These soldiers went beyond their expected duties to protect their motherland.

programme.title: Epicpedia
programme.desc: The filmmaker sheds light on the lesser-known facts about the country of India through voyages that have enabled the documentation of the evolution of India.

programme.title: Raja Rasoi Aur Anya Kahaniyaan
programme.desc: The narrator provides information about the local cuisines in several regions of India and the extravagant culinary traditions of Indian royalty.

programme.title: Kissa Currency Ka
programme.desc: The filmmaker explores the journey of the Indian currency, highlighting its evolution from ancient kingdoms to modern times.

programme.title: Mid Wicket Tales

programme.desc: The filmmaker sheds light on the lesser-known facts about the country of India through voyages that have enabled the documentation of the evolution of India.

programme.title: Regiment Diaries
programme.desc: The host provides insights into the various regiments of the Indian army, their training, traditions, history, contributions and how a civilian becomes a soldier.

programme.title: What's In The Name
programme.desc: The filmmaker delves into the fascinating stories behind the names of different places while also examining how certain people received various titles.

programme.desc: The narrator sheds light on the origins of various communities settled in India along with their customs and traditions.

programme.title: Sharanam
programme.desc: The host explores various religious sites across India, highlighting their cultural significance and sharing testimonies of pilgrims.

programme.title: Veshbhusha
programme.desc: Tracing the origins of traditional Indian attires, the host delves deeper into the historical significance of the indigenous clothing of the country.

programme.title: Safarnama
programme.desc: Ankit Siwach visits some of the unexplored destinations in India and provides an insight into their culture, heritage, cuisine and natural beauty.

programme.title: Parikrama
programme.desc: The presenter sheds light on the rich history, sacred customs and religious significance of some of India's most magnificent temples.

programme.title: Rajvansh: Dynasties of India
programme.desc: The host sheds light on several kingdoms in ancient India while also exploring the history of their dynasties.

programme.title: Ekaant
programme.desc: The host explores abandoned historical spots in India that are filled with mystery and studies how these once-flourishing places came to be in ruins.

programme.desc: While the Willises and Louise thinks that is a bad idea to engage a writer to write Lionel's term paper, Lionel likes it, and this results in an argument between the two families and soon a break-up.

programme.title: Frasier Ep02
programme.desc: The sibling rivalry between Frasier and Niles reaches a fever pitch when they try and 'top' each other's 65th birthday gift to their father, Martin.

programme.title: Gilligan's Island Ep03
programme.desc: The island is taken over by an exiled Latin American dictator.

programme.title: Mission Impossible Ep25
programme.desc: In a bold experiment with a man's mind, the IMF blanks out an enemy agent's memory then sets out to make him think he is someone else.

programme.title: Agatha Christie's Marple Ep08
programme.desc: The cryptic final words of a dying man lead Miss Marple and two young adventurers to a dysfunctional family harboring dark secrets.

programme.title: ALF Ep13
programme.desc: An unexpected visit by Kate's overbearing mother forces ALF to retreat into a cage in the garage--until he decides to confront her in person.

programme.title: Airwolf Ep02
programme.desc: Michael Archangel, a CIA project director, enlists Vietnam veteran Stringfellow Hawke and Dominic Santini to recover Airwolf, a state-of-the-art helicopter which is a tool in the Mid-Eastern struggle.

programme.title: The Jeffersons Ep17
programme.desc: Three days have passed after the Jeffersons and the Willises have broken up, and George is the only one who's happy about the situation.

programme.title: The Jeffersons Ep18
programme.desc: Florence shows out-of-character actions one day, including cleaning the Jeffersons' entire apartment without griping and giving Louise a prized possession of hers.

programme.title: Murder, She Wrote Ep22
programme.desc: Jessica investigates the murder of a visiting romance novelist's assistant who was having an affair with the writer's publisher husband.

programme.title: Frasier Ep02
programme.desc: The sibling rivalry between Frasier and Niles reaches a fever pitch when they try and 'top' each other's 65th birthday gift to their father, Martin.

programme.title: Gilligan's Island Ep03
programme.desc: The island is taken over by an exiled Latin American dictator.

programme.title: The Six Million Dollar Man Ep16
programme.desc: A young woman is caught in the middle when Steve tries to save the last of a species of cougar that a hunting posse is after.

programme.title: Frasier Ep03
programme.desc: Niles' Halloween costume party becomes a comedy of errors when he mistakenly thinks that Daphne is pregnant -- and Frasier's the father.

programme.title: Gilligan's Island Ep04
programme.desc: A Mars-bound camera lands on the island, and the scientists tracking it think the castaways are Martians.

programme.title: CSI Ep01
programme.desc: A feverish night in Las Vegas results in one dead male in an alien suit, one more dead male in a bathtub, one dead female with two suspicous men at the scene, and another dead male with a polaroid of yet another dead male.

programme.title: Mission Impossible Ep01
programme.desc: Leonard Nimoy formerly of the Star Trek series and guest star Dina Merrill join the Impossible Missions Force to fight a mind-destroying drug that could enslave the free world in the first of a two-part episode.

programme.title: Law & Order: Special Victims Unit Ep01
programme.desc: A woman with multiple personalities may have abused and fatally harmed her daughter. As investigations continue, Donovan continues to present even more personalities along with a harrowing twist to the case.

programme.title: The Chronicles of Riddick
programme.desc: The wanted criminal Richard Bruno Riddick arrives on a planet called Helion Prime and finds himself up against an invading empire called the Necromongers, an army that plans to convert or kill all humans in the universe.

programme.title: 48 Hrs.
programme.desc: A weary cop springs a con out of jail for two days in order to track down a criminal.

programme.title: Once Upon a Time in the West
programme.desc: A mysterious woman in the Old West is in danger from a band of ruthless gunmen.

programme.title: King Solomon's Mines (1985)
programme.desc: Fortune hunter Allan Quatermain teams up with a resourceful woman to help her find her missing father lost in the wilds of 1900s Africa while being pursued by hostile tribes and a rival German explorer.

programme.title: Daredevil
programme.desc: A lawyer blinded by radioactive waste fights crime as an acrobatic martial arts superhero, using his other senses, which have been enhanced.

programme.title: Deep Impact
programme.desc: A comet is discovered to be on a collision course with Earth. As doomsday nears, the human race prepares for the worst.

programme.title: The Lovely Bones
programme.desc: When 14-year-old Susie Salmon was murdered, she left her unfinished life behind. But now from her place in a strange but beautiful in-between world, she must help her father catch her killer and protect her family before she can finally move on. Filled with thrilling suspense, hope and the redeeming power of love.

programme.title: King Solomon's Mines (1985)
programme.desc: Fortune hunter Allan Quatermain teams up with a resourceful woman to help her find her missing father lost in the wilds of 1900s Africa while being pursued by hostile tribes and a rival German explorer.

programme.title: Open S
programme.desc: A deer buddies up with a domesticated grizzly bear when the two animals are alone in the woods during hunting season.

programme.title: How to Train Your Dragon 2
programme.desc: When Hiccup and Toothless discover an ice cave that is home to hundreds of new wild dragons and the mysterious Dragon Rider, the two friends find themselves at the center of a battle to protect the peace.

programme.title: Bride Wars
programme.desc: When a clerical error causes a clash in wedding dates, two best friends who'd do anything for each other find themselves in a no-holds-barred, take-no-prisoners struggle that threatens to erupt into all-out war.

programme.title: The Quiet Man
programme.desc: A tired American ex-boxer returns to his native hamlet in Ireland to win the hand of a spirited young woman. programme.title: Star Trek (2009)
programme.desc: A prequel focusing on a young James T. Kirk and Mr. Spock, chronicling their first meeting at Starfleet Academy and their first space mission.

programme.desc: Captain Whip returns to Hawaii. He's inherited 'worthless' land. He starts a plantation, staffed with a Chinese couple from his ship. Drilling thru lava for water and stealing/smuggling pineapple from French Guyana, things look brighter.

programme.title: Crime Spree
programme.desc: A group of French thieves is tasked with stealing an expensive necklace from a home in Chicago. However, the robbery turns into a fiasco when they realize that the house belongs to a mafia kingpin.

programme.title: Non-Stop
programme.desc: A US air marshal receives threatening messages demanding that his airline transfer USD 150 million dollars to an offshore account, in the absence of which the passengers of his flight will be killed.

programme.title: Stars!
programme.desc: The host sheds light on various popular individuals from different walks of life and highlights their individual journeys to stardom.

programme.title: Hollywood on Set
programme.desc: The key aspects of filmmaking are explored, with behind-the-scenes insights and intriguing interviews with prominent cast and crew members.

programme.title: Mune
programme.desc: Necross, the former guardian of the sun, turns evil and steals it. Now, Mune, Glim and Sohone, three friends, must work together to retrieve it back from him.

programme.title: The Starving Games
programme.desc: In a deadly game orchestrated by President Snowballs, skilled archer Kantmiss Evershot, her boyfriend Dale and tech-savvy ally Peter Malarkey must rely on their wits and skills to survive.

programme.title: Let Me In
programme.desc: Owen leads a lonely life and is bullied by his peers at school. He happily befriends Abby, his new helpful neighbour, without being aware that she is hiding a secret from him.

programme.title: The Kidnapping of Freddy Heineken
programme.desc: A gang of childhood friends make a plan to abduct one of the richest men on the earth and demand the largest ransom ever paid for any kidnapping.

programme.title: Southpaw
programme.desc: After a devastating accident shatters his world, a once-celebrated champion boxer spirals into a destructive abyss. Subsequently, he decides to fight for his daughter and revive his fading career.

programme.title: Born to Fight
programme.desc: Dan Barnes, a former professional boxer, takes up the responsibility to coach Matthew Miller, a teenager who is repeatedly bullied by a school boxing champion and his friends.

programme.title: Incoming
programme.desc: Imprisoned at the International Space Station, a group of terrorists manage to escape confinement and take control of the ship. However, their mission to target the Soviets threatens world peace.

programme.title: Braven
programme.desc: A logger and his father head to their hunting cabin, hoping for a quiet weekend. Instead, they find themselves in a kill-or-be-killed stand for survival when they encounter a gang of drug traffickers.

programme.title: Vampires Suck
programme.desc: Becca Crane falls in love with Edward Sullen, a vampire. However, when Jacob White, enters their life, they face challenges.

programme.title: I Am Wrath
programme.desc: After corrupt cops are unable to catch his wife's killers, Stanley, an unemployed man, teams up with an old friend to avenge her death.

programme.title: The Pink Panther
programme.desc: A bumbling Inspector Clouseau is tasked with solving the French football coach's murder and the theft of the Pink Panther, a priceless diamond from his ring.

programme.title: RoboCop
programme.desc: Detective Alex Murphy is on the brink of death after being critically injured in a bomb blast. However, a technology company transforms him into RoboCop, a one-of-a-kind cyborg police officer.

programme.title: Rocky
programme.desc: An unknown boxer gets a chance to fight the world heavyweight champion and he blindly jumps into the ring in a bid to earn respect and glory.

programme.title: The November Man
programme.desc: Peter, a former CIA officer, is assigned the task of protecting a valuable witness, Alice, who has secret information about a Russian presidential candidate.

programme.title: Set Up
programme.desc: After his friend betrays him and disappears with the stolen goods, Sonny seeks vengeance. Subsequently, he partners up with a dangerous mob boss to achieve his goal.

programme.title: Absolute Deception
programme.desc: Rebecca Scott, a widowed reporter, teams up with an FBI agent to uncover the mystery of her husband's death. However, things take a turn when they are targeted by unknown enemies.

programme.title: Southpaw
programme.desc: After a devastating accident shatters his world, a once-celebrated champion boxer spirals into a destructive abyss. Subsequently, he decides to fight for his daughter and revive his fading career.

programme.title: Sinister 2
programme.desc: Courtney Collins, a single mother, relocates to a rural home with her twin sons. Later, she discovers it's inhabited by malevolent spirits connected to the sinister entity Bughuul.

programme.title: Giallo
programme.desc: In Italy, a woman fears her sister has been kidnapped; Inspector Enzo Avolfi fears it's worse. They team up to rescue her from a sadistic killer known only as Yellow.

programme.title: StreetDance 2
programme.desc: After an embaressing defeat, a street dancer, Ash, assembles the best dancers from all across the world for another around against the Invincible crew.

programme.title: Let Me In
programme.desc: Owen leads a lonely life and is bullied by his peers at school. He happily befriends Abby, his new helpful neighbour, without being aware that she is hiding a secret from him.

programme.title: Rocky Balboa
programme.desc: Rocky Balboa fights champion Mason Dixon in a surprise return. His unexpected comeback inspires many, defying age and odds.

programme.title: Species II
programme.desc: During a mission to Mars, alien DNA invades an astronaut's body. To contain the creature, Dr Laura Baker and her former colleague Preston join forces.

programme.title: Lady Bloodfight
programme.desc: Jane, an American girl travelling in Hong Kong, gets into a physical altercation with three robbers where she defends herself. A martial artist, who observes the event, trains her for a competition.

programme.title: Alex Cross
programme.desc: While investigating a murder, Alex Cross learns of a ruthless serial killer. However, things soon spiral out of control, leading him on a quest for revenge and uncovering a dark web of conspiracy.

programme.title: Vampires Suck
programme.desc: Becca Crane falls in love with Edward Sullen, a vampire. However, when Jacob White, enters their life, they face challenges.

programme.title: Spider-Man: Into the Spider-Verse
programme.desc: Miles Morales begins his new life as Spider-Man after receiving a spider bite. However, things take a strange twist when he meets alternate versions of himself from other universes.

programme.title: Non-Stop
programme.desc: A US air marshal receives threatening messages demanding that his airline transfer USD 150 million dollars to an offshore account, in the absence of which the passengers of his flight will be killed.

programme.title: Vehicle 19
programme.desc: Michael Woods, a traveller and a parolee, picks up the wrong rental car to meet his wife which makes him the prime target of a group of corrupt police officers.

programme.title: 3 Days to Kill
programme.desc: After being diagnosed with a terminal illness, spy Ethan Renner decides to give up his career. While looking after his teenage daughter, he must finish his final mission of catching a terrorist.

programme.title: Fly Me to the Moon
programme.desc: Isabelle plans to marry a stranger to break a family curse, which leads every first marriage to end in a divorce, in order to get married to her long-time boyfriend Pierre.

programme.title: Mune
programme.desc: Necross, the former guardian of the sun, turns evil and steals it. Now, Mune, Glim and Sohone, three friends, must work together to retrieve it back from him.

programme.title: The Starving Games
programme.desc: In a deadly game orchestrated by President Snowballs, skilled archer Kantmiss Evershot, her boyfriend Dale and tech-savvy ally Peter Malarkey must rely on their wits and skills to survive.

programme.title: Stars!
programme.desc: The host sheds light on various popular individuals from different walks of life and highlights their individual journeys to stardom.

programme.title: Mandira Bedi; The Love Laugh Live Show
programme.desc: The host invites prominent personalities and engages them in candid conversations about their personal and professional lives.

programme.title: Down With Love
programme.desc: Barbara Novak's bold feminist book shakes up 1960s New York, sparking a sharp and witty rivalry with the charming journalist Catcher Block.

programme.title: Lay the Favorite
programme.desc: Ambitious about living the life of a cocktail waitress, a lap dancer tries her luck in Las Vegas. However, her life takes an unexpected turn after she falls in love with a sports gambler.

programme.title: Bedazzled
programme.desc: Elliot, a lonely IT worker, makes a deal with the Devil, gaining seven wishes to win Alison's heart, but each wish takes an unexpected turn with hilarious and chaotic results.

programme.title: Life or Something Like It
programme.desc: A TV newswoman takes a look at her life after a psychic tells her that she has only days to live.

programme.title: Alvin and the Chipmunks: The Road Chip
programme.desc: Alvin, Simon and Theodore believe that Dave is going to propose to his girlfriend, Samantha, in Miami. In a bid to retain their place in Dave's life, the three set out to stop him.

programme.title: Meet Dave
programme.desc: A human-shaped spaceship, controlled by 100 mini humanoid aliens, lands on earth. However, things take an unexpected turn for the small aliens when their captain falls for a woman named Gina.

programme.title: The Intern
programme.desc: Ben Whittaker, a 70-year-old widower, realises that he is not cut out for retirement. He then applies to become a senior intern for a sceptical boss at an online fashion site.

programme.title: The Rewrite
programme.desc: Keith Michaels, an Oscar-winning writer, teaches at the Binghamton University on the East Coast after losing his popularity in Hollywood and falls in love with Holly, a fellow teacher.

programme.title: Penelope
programme.desc: A young girl hailing from an affluent family embarks on a quest for true love to dispel a curse that has pervaded her family.

programme.title: Me Before You
programme.desc: Louisa becomes the carer of William, a cold man who has paralysis. They soon fall in love but she is devastated to hear that he does not want to live so she tries to change his mind.

programme.title: The Way, Way Back
programme.desc: Duncan, a shy teenager, visits a beach house owned by his mother's boyfriend. Annoyed with everyone, he wanders away to a local water park and meets Owen, who helps him open up to the world.

programme.title: And So It Goes
programme.desc: Oren is deliberately mean to the people around him. However, he is forced to change his attitude and take help from his neighbour Leah when he is asked to look after his nine-year-old granddaughter.

programme.title: St. Vincent
programme.desc: Maggie, a working single mother, allows Vincent, a hedonistic misanthrope, to babysit her 12-year-old son Oliver. Soon, a beautiful friendship develops between Vincent and Oliver.

programme.title: Hollywood on Set
programme.desc: The key aspects of filmmaking are explored, with behind-the-scenes insights and intriguing interviews with prominent cast and crew members.

programme.title: DSC
programme.desc: Talented directors provide an entertaining insight into the most intriguing stories and anecdotes concerning some of their best works.

programme.title: Breaking Up
programme.desc: Monica, a schoolteacher, and Steve, a photographer, have been deeply in love for over two years now. However, their impulsive natures often push their fragile relationship into an on-and-off cycle.

programme.title: The Great Dictator
programme.desc: After suffering from memory loss, a soldier returns to his former profession as a barber and attempts to escape persecution by the military forces.

programme.title: Stepmom
programme.desc: Isabel, a fashion photographer, struggles to endear herself to her divorcee boyfriend's children and his ex-wife Jackie. However, a diagnosis of terminal cancer sparks a change in their relationship.

programme.title: Monte Carlo
programme.desc: Grace, who is vacationing in Paris with her friends and stepsister, is mistaken for a British heiress. Later, the three women are whisked away to Monte Carlo, where they discover royalty and romance.

programme.title: St. Vincent
programme.desc: Maggie, a working single mother, allows Vincent, a hedonistic misanthrope, to babysit her 12-year-old son Oliver. Soon, a beautiful friendship develops between Vincent and Oliver.

programme.title: The Internship
programme.desc: Two salesmen whose careers have been affected due to digitalisation take up the internship at Google and compete with younger skilled IT geniuses.

programme.desc: Antonie and Julie, past lovers, coincidently find themselves seated next to each other on a flight. As conversation ensues, past memories are revived, as they strive to understand each other again.

programme.desc: An exiled squirrel plans to rob a nut store to provide food for his former colony. Unfortunately, the store is also a front for bank robbers.

programme.title: The Equalizer 2
programme.desc: Robert McCall, who serves an unflinching justice for the exploited and oppressed, embarks on a relentless, globe-trotting quest for vengeance when a long-time girl friend Susan Plummer is murdered.

programme.title: The Foreigner
programme.desc: Businessman with a buried past seeks justice when his daughter is killed in an act of terrorism. A cat-and-mouse conflict ensues with a government official, whose past may hold clues to the killers' identities.

programme.title: Anger Management
programme.desc: Dave Buznik is a businessman who is wrongly sentenced to an anger management program, where he meets an aggressive instructor.

programme.title: Furry Vengeance
programme.desc: In the Oregon wilderness, a real-estate developer's new housing subdivision faces a unique group of protestors: local woodland creatures who don't want their homes disturbed.

programme.title: The Emoji Movie
programme.desc: Three emojis embark on an epic adventure through a smartphone to save their world from deletion.

programme.title: No Strings Attached
programme.desc: A guy and girl try to keep their relationship strictly physical, but it's not long before they learn that they want something more.

programme.title: The Equalizer
programme.desc: A man who believes he has put his mysterious past behind him cannot stand idly by when he meets a young girl under the control of ultra-violent Russian gangsters.

programme.title: Exhalation
programme.desc: A young woman returns to her birthplace for an ex-classmate's funeral.

programme.title: KITA Branded Film - Famili Ikat Tepi

programme.title: Slaughterhouse Rulez
programme.desc: An illustrious British boarding school becomes a bloody battleground when a mysterious sinkhole appears at a nearby fracking site, unleashing unspeakable horror.

programme.title: Rambo: First Blood
programme.desc: A veteran Green Beret is forced by a cruel Sheriff and his deputies to flee into the mountains and wage an escalating one-man war against his pursuers.

programme.desc: Emma's father and her high school frenemy start dating so she embarks on a mission to break up the happy couple.

programme.title: Don't Breathe 2
programme.desc: Norman, a visually challenged navy veteran, lives in quiet solace with his foster daughter, Phoenix. However, he is forced to tap into his darker instincts when Phoenix is abducted.

programme.title: The Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: Milo is hired to track down his ex-wife, Nicole, for skipping bail. Subsequently, a routine retrieval turns into a deadly game of cat and mouse, forcing them both to go on the run together.

programme.title: The Ugly Truth
programme.desc: Abby, a lovelorn TV producer, finds herself in the midst of tests when she strikes a deal with her chauvinistic colleague, Mike, who wants to prove to her the accuracy of his relationship theories.

programme.title: The Karate Kid Part III
programme.desc: Fueled by vengeance, an old enemy orchestrates a series of problematic events that end up driving a wedge between Mr Miyagi and his beloved martial arts student Daniel.

programme.title: The Emoji Movie
programme.desc: Gene is a smartphone emoji who can show a wide range of emotions instead of just one. When he makes a mistake that threatens his life, he sets out to become normal like his fellow emojis.

programme.title: Welcome to the Jungle
programme.desc: A group of co-workers embark on a team-building exercise on an uninhabited island. However, when their ex-marine guide is killed, they are left stranded and must struggle to survive.

programme.title: The Unholy
programme.desc: After a girl with hearing impairment envisions the Virgin Mary and regains her ability to hear along with other powers, a journalist unravels the truth behind this paranoia.

programme.title: Spider-Man: Homecoming
programme.desc: Peter Parker tries to stop the Vulture from selling weapons made with advanced Chitauri technology while trying to balance his life as an ordinary high school student.

programme.title: Uncharted
programme.desc: Recruited by Victor, street-smart Nathan steps into a race for the lost treasure of Ferdinand Magellan. However, a corrupt billionaire and an evil mercenary also have the same goal.

programme.title: Captain Phillips
programme.desc: Somali pirates attack the Maersk Alabama, a container ship, while it is on its course to Kenya. Richard Phillips, the captain of the ship, uses his wits to negotiate with them to save his crew.

programme.title: Men in Black: International
programme.desc: Agent M, a probationary member of the MIB, teams up with Agent H and uncovers a sinister plot that reveals a traitor in the organisation aiding an alien invasion.

programme.title: The Angry Birds Movie
programme.desc: Red, Chuck and Bomb have always been the outcasts within a community of flightless birds on an island. But when mysterious green pigs intrude the island, it is up to them to figure out the reason.

programme.title: Jumanji: Welcome to the Jungle
programme.desc: Four teenagers embark on the adventure of a lifetime when an old video game magically transports them to the jungle world of Jumanji and transforms them into their adult avatars.

programme.title: BUCCHIGIRI?!
programme.desc: After returning to his hometown, a youngster meets his childhood confidante and then, gets into a brawl with gangs until a genie enters his life.

programme.title: Radiant
programme.desc: Four individuals, driven by their quest for medical solutions, become unwitting subjects of an artificial pathogen known as radiant.

programme.title: Radiant
programme.desc: Four individuals, driven by their quest for medical solutions, become unwitting subjects of an artificial pathogen known as radiant.

programme.title: Escape Room
programme.desc: Six people from different walks of life participate in an escape room competition to win ten thousand dollars. Things change when they find themselves in horrifying circumstances.

programme.title: Bad Boys
programme.desc: Marcus, a family man, and Mike, a ladies' man, are partners in the Miami police department. Things get complicated when they assume each other's identity while investigating a drug deal.

programme.title: Stealth
programme.desc: An artificial intelligence-enabled fighter-bomber develops sentience when struck by lightning during a mission. Three expert pilots must apprehend the bomber before it precipitates a nuclear war.

programme.title: Anyone But You
programme.desc: What begins as an instant attraction for Ben and Bea quickly takes a nosedive, culminating in a tense reunion at a wedding they both attend six months later.

programme.title: Money Train
programme.desc: A revengeful New York City transit policeman resolves to rob a state-of-the-art train laden with lots of money. Meanwhile, his foster brother, who is also a policeman, endeavours to safeguard him.

programme.title: Bad Boys: Ride or Die
programme.desc: Mike and Marcus face their toughest case yet as their late captain's reputation hangs in the balance. Subsequently, they unravel a complex web of cartel connections in a high-stakes mission.

programme.title: The Mitchells vs. the Machines
programme.desc: The Mitchells, a dysfunctional family, must fight a robot apocalypse amidst their much-awaited road trip to save humanity.

programme.title: Spider-Man 2
programme.desc: After losing his job, lover and his powers, Peter Parker feels dissatisfied with his life. Soon, amidst all this chaos, he also has to fight Doctor Octavius who poses a threat to the New York.

programme.title: The Pope's Exorcist
programme.desc: Father Gabriele Amorth, an exorcist, uncovers a hidden conspiracy as he investigates the horrifying possession of a young boy.

programme.title: The Water Horse
programme.desc: Young Angus Mac Morrow discovers a mysterious egg that grows up to be the Loch Ness monster. As they form a strong relationship, the boy's family refuses to believe in the creature's existence.

programme.title: Bullet Train
programme.desc: Ladybug, a professional assassin, is assigned to retrieve a briefcase from a bullet train. Soon, he finds himself battling many other killers who board the same train but with a different objective.

programme.title: Kung Fu Hustle
programme.desc: An aspiring gangster pretends to be part of a notorious gang and tries to terrorise a neighbourhood. However, unknown to him, three martial arts experts live there and are ready to take him down.

programme.title: Godzilla
programme.desc: The fallout of a military nuclear test causes an iguana to mutate into a giant monster. Now this monster lays waste to cannery ships and New York city in order to feed and protect its brood.

programme.title: BUCCHIGIRI?!
programme.desc: After returning to his hometown, a youngster meets his childhood confidante and then, gets into a brawl with gangs until a genie enters his life.

programme.desc: Two families equipped with armed robots decide to come together and fight extraterrestrial aliens threatening the existence of mankind on Earth.

programme.title: Samson
programme.desc: Samson, a Hebrew with extraordinary strength, must use his God-given gift to rally his people to freedom from the evil Philistines.

programme.title: Mulan

programme.title: Raid
programme.desc: Prabhakaran, a man from Chennai, takes an oath to eradicate wrongdoers in society. However. he faces many struggles and problems from his enemies.

programme.title: Aakhree Raasta
programme.desc: An ex-convict is bent on revenge against the people responsible for his wrongful imprisonment but is pit against his estranged son who is now a police officer.

programme.title: Flight
programme.desc: Multi-millionaire Ranveer Malhotra goes against all odds and takes on some life-threatening obstacles in a bid for survival on an aeroplane after his manufacturing company deals with a massive fiasco.

programme.title: Chup
programme.desc: Inspector General Arvind Mathur investigates the deaths and mutilations of multiple film critics in Mumbai. Soon, he begins to deduce that the culprit is killing his victims due to their reviews.

programme.title: Nanhe Jaisalmer
programme.desc: Nanhe, a tourist guide in Jaisalmer, is obsessed with his favourite actor, Bobby Deol. His dreams turn into reality when he learns that Bobby is visiting his city for a film shoot.

programme.title: Santa Banta Pvt. Ltd.
programme.desc: Passed off as spies, two inept pals are sent to Fiji to rescue a kidnapped bureaucrat. Soon enough, they're creating more problems than they're solving.

programme.title: Udta Punjab
programme.desc: A story that revolves around drug abuse in the affluent north Indian State of Punjab and how the youth there have succumbed to it en-masse resulting in a socio-economic decline.

programme.title: Kedarnath
programme.desc: Mansoor, a reserved Muslim porter, falls in love with Mukku, the beautiful and rebellious daughter of a Hindu priest. But their love is put to the test amid misunderstandings and nature's wrath.

programme.desc: Four idlers make elaborate plans to earn money by investing in buildings but are conned by Kabir, who leaves them unemployed and penniless. Soon, they are on the prowl to avenge their humiliation.
